infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: eClean needs your location to show nearby tasks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: eClean tracks your location during active tasks so buyers can see cleaning progress in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: eClean tracks your location during active tasks so buyers can see cleaning progress in real-time.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: eClean needs camera access to take before/after photos of your cleaning work.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: eClean needs photo library access to upload cleaning evidence photos.
